studies.title: GAIA - Digital Therapeutics | News
studies.abstract: attexis RCT shows clinically relevant reduction in adult ADHD symptoms and is published in Psychological Medicine Hamburg — March 11, 2026 A randomized controlled trial (RCT) published today in Psychological Medicine demonstrates a significant and clinically relevant reduction in ADHD symptoms in adults using the digital therapy "attexis".
studies.brief_summary: attexis RCT shows clinically relevant reduction in adult ADHD symptoms and is published in Psychological Medicine Hamburg — March 11, 2026 A randomized controlled trial (RCT) published today in Psychological Medicine demonstrates a significant and clinically relevant reduction in ADHD symptoms in adults using the digital therapy "attexis".

_verification.reason: The study specifically mentions 'attexis' as the digital therapy used in the RCT, which is the exact product in question. The full text confirms that the intervention was conducted by GAIA, the manufacturer of attexis.

_classification.reason: Keyword match: 3 RCT indicators vs 0 RWE indicators.

studies.title: attexis-RCT zeigt klinisch relevante Reduktion der ADHS-Symptomatik bei ...
studies.abstract: The results provide robust clinical evidence that digital cognitive behavioral therapy interventions can provide adults with ADHD with effective and well-accepted treatment. I am particularly pleased that we are thus making a contribution to closing the care gap for those affected.
studies.brief_summary: The results provide robust clinical evidence that digital cognitive behavioral therapy interventions can provide adults with ADHD with effective and well-accepted treatment. I am particularly pleased that we are thus making a contribution to closing the care gap for those affected.

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital therapeutic product 'attexis', as evidenced by the title and full text mentioning 'attexis-RCT' and the involvement of GAIA AG, the manufacturer.

_classification.reason: The study is described as an 'RCT' in the title and metadata, indicating it is a randomized controlled trial, which involves random allocation of participants to intervention and control groups under controlled conditions.

studies.title: GAIA - Digital Therapeutics | Science
studies.abstract: GAIA is a research-based public health company. We have been developing innovative solutions in the fields of health-care management and e/m-Health since 1997. We combine scientific, technological and therapeutic competence under one roof.
studies.brief_summary: GAIA is a research-based public health company. We have been developing innovative solutions in the fields of health-care management and e/m-Health since 1997. We combine scientific, technological and therapeutic competence under one roof.

_verification.reason: The study specifically evaluates the effectiveness of 'attexis', a digital intervention for adults with ADHD, in a randomized controlled trial. The product name 'attexis' is explicitly mentioned in the full text.

_classification.reason: The study described is a multicenter randomized controlled trial sponsored by the German Ministry of Health, where participants were randomized to either the deprexis intervention or a control group, which is characteristic of an RCT design.
